title: copper grumbot
description: A ressource pack to add Mumbo Jumbo's mustache to copper golems !
body:
This datapack adds Mumbo Jumbo's mustache to copper golems !
As they oxidize the mustache will also change to make it look older !

![copper grumbot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e84aab87e8a6a04d1a9d6d8d8d79121b33e100f9.png)

this pack adds a mustache to all 4 copper golem variants, statues and also to the copper golem spawn egg !
